summary: Frontend testing for sortable columns and mobile responsiveness. All 4 pages (Party Analytics with 4 tabs, Profit Analysis, Current Stock, Purchase Rates) have working sortable columns with data-testid attributes. Mobile layout is responsive with scrollable tabs and hidden columns on smaller screens. No console errors. Pagination works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ useSortableData hook correctly implements sorting with direction toggle (desc→asc→desc)
✓ SortableHeader component renders ArrowUpDown (inactive), ArrowUp (asc), ArrowDown (desc) icons correctly
✓ All sortable headers have data-testid='sort-{sortKey}' for testing
✓ Page resets to 1 on sort change - prevents showing empty pages
✓ Mobile responsive: tabs use overflow-x-auto for horizontal scrolling
✓ Columns hidden on mobile with 'hidden sm:table-cell' class for Fine Wt, Sales Value, Txns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sortable columns feature fully implemented on Party Analytics (4 tabs), Profit Analysis, Current Stock, Purchase Rates pages. Uses useSortableData hook and SortableHeader component. Mobile responsiveness verified with scrollable tabs and responsive column visibility.

Mobile Responsiveness.hidden_columns_mobile: PASSED - 3 columns hidden on mobile with 'hidden sm:table-cell'
Mobile Responsiveness.sorting_on_mobile: PASSED - sorting headers clickable on mobile

Pagination.status: PASSED - pagination works on all tabs, page resets to 1 on sort change

Console Errors.status: PASSED - No console errors on any page
